steps.assistant_text: Candidate-elimination beats last-candidate coloring: fully inlining the vtable-address locals (p/idx/q/fn) removes competing coloring candidates so only the CSE'd stride 0x28 remains (colors v1); prior cap analysis only tried moving the stride earlier. Then commutative-operand source swap: idx*0x28 + (char*)base + 0x90 (mult first in source) flips addu to base-first. 17/32 -> 30/32 -> 32/32.
